title: Pan-Seared Gyoza with Rich Dipping Sauce
description: A Chinese-inspired dish featuring crispy pan-seared gyoza served with a rich and tangy dipping sauce. Perfect for a quick and delicious snack or appetizer.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the gyoza to the skillet and sear until the bottoms are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
3. Flip the gyoza over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the other sides are golden brown.
4. While the gyoza is cooking, mix together the soy sauce, rice vinegar, sour cream, green onions, and ginger in a small bowl.
5. Remove the gyoza from the skillet and place on a serving plate.
6. Serve the gyoza with the rich dipping sauce and enjoy!
